 ?: help  │  F1-F3: tabs  │  tab: next field  │  ctrl+s: send  │  ctrl+p: preview  │  ctrl+a: attach  │  ctrl+g: AI
 esc: back  │  alt+l/c/f/r: logs/chat/sidebar/refresh  │  ctrl+c: quit
